race.comment: STARTS NOW (11) has been solid in both runs back without threatening, though he strips fitter third-up and is capable of making his presence felt. PHINEAS (10) had been showing signs before putting it all together last week with a narrow victory. Backs up quickly and keeps Holder aboard. LARIO (6) is impossible to knock, chasing a hat-trick and drawing ideally in barrier one for Milnes. Expect him to roll forward and take catching. I CATCHEM FOX (4) maps for a soft run and gets in well with the 3kg claim. Third-up now, he's among the key chances. CONCORDE (13) will be at big odds again after a plain first-up run, but this trip suits better and his best form measures up. Don't dismiss entirely.
